# MapleGamma (morning briefing)

> Automated daily market dashboard. A 5-model AI council (risk-contrarian,
> quantitative/GEX, momentum, trade-selector, fundamental analyst + an
> aggregator) produces an S&P 500 regime call, key levels, risks and paper
> trades every weekday morning (~7:20 ET). Outcomes are scored nightly against
> realized ^GSPC direction and the lessons feed back into the next morning
> prompt. Paper trading only — nothing here is financial advice.

## Access model

The **Dashboard** (the site home) and the **Pricing** page are free and open —
no account needed. Everything else is behind a subscription with a 7-day free
trial:

- **Basic** — everything in Free, plus the full screener, research desk,
  prediction-market sentiment and trade ideas, and the simulated portfolio,
  positions and trade journal.
- **Pro** — everything in Basic, plus interactive charts, gamma walls,
  strike-level exposure, model/backtest data, walk-forward validation, the
  prediction engine, live simulation and council history. Options-strategy and
  crypto-cohort previews are currently public; deeper subscriber controls and
  analysis are planned for Pro.

The dashboard is JavaScript-rendered; agents should read the open JSON endpoints
below directly.

## Open data endpoints (JSON, refreshed weekday mornings ET)

These are public and free to fetch:

- /data/latest.json : market summary snapshot — VIX, 10-year yield, and major
  index levels/changes (S&P 500, Dow, NASDAQ, TSX, VIX)
- /data/verdict.json : the day's directional signal and conviction, with a
  narrative and the underlying model features
- /data/reddit-sentiment.json : WSB / r-stocks sentiment summaries
- /data/maplegamma-data.json : gamma-exposure overview per ticker (net GEX/DEX/VEX,
  gamma regime, gamma profile by strike, key levels)
- /data/analysis.json : curated market headlines with sentiment tags
  (Seeking Alpha + BNN Bloomberg)


## Subscription-gated (not open endpoints)

The following data and features power the paid Research, Screener, Charts and
Models areas and are available only to subscribers via the authenticated app —
they are not published as fetchable public URLs:

- **Basic:** council briefing/context A/B arm (maplegamma_analysis), full
  screener (screener-data), morning analysis, web news, Polymarket sentiment,
  earnings, SEC filings, trade journal, simulated portfolio (paper_trades), and
  IBKR account/positions/trades data.
- **Pro:** charts and per-ticker analytics (charts), walk-forward validation
  (walk_forward and walk_forward_v2), strategy-improvement/model-accuracy
  weights (including the B arm), scored trade outcomes (including the B arm),
  prediction-engine, accuracy, council history, and simulation data.

## Engine

- Code: https://github.com/arshad1416/hermes-scripts (runs on a Raspberry Pi;
  this site only hosts the outputs)
- Site repo: https://github.com/arshad1416/morning-briefing
